name: Empanadas Decamote Conpina (Dessert Turnovers)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the pastry ingredients until the mixture holds together. Chill.
2. Cut into 3-inch circles.
3. Mix the filling together.
4. Place heaping teaspoonfuls on each pastry circle.
5. Fold over and press edges together.
6. Bake at 375°F until golden brown.
